steps: Go to https://dashboard.alchemy.com/signup and create a free account (or sign in at https://dashboard.alchemy.com/)
From the dashboard, click '+ Create new app'
Enter an app name and optional description
Select the chain(s) you want to use (e.g. Ethereum Mainnet)
On the app detail page, click 'API Key' in the top right to reveal your API key
Copy the API key for use in your requests

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Alchemy API key, embedded in the request URL path (e.g. https://eth-mainnet.g.alchemy.com/v2/YOUR_KEY)

notes: Free tier available: 300 million compute units/month
The API key is embedded in the URL path, not an HTTP header (e.g. /v2/{apiKey})
Each app gets one API key; create multiple apps for different projects or networks
Supports 50+ networks: Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Solana, and more
The free plan includes NFT API, Token API, Transfers API, and Prices API

test_endpoint.description: Fetch NFTs for a known Ethereum address to verify the API key works
